home.heroSubheadline: Raised with love for each one from the very first days
home.trustWcfDesc: Official cattery registered with the World Cat Federation
home.trustHealthDesc: All parents tested for genetic diseases
home.trustHomeDesc: Kittens grow up in a family environment
home.kittensEmpty: No kittens available at the moment
home.kittensWaitlist: Join our waitlist to be notified when new kittens arrive.
home.aboutText: Floriente Cattery is a small, family-run cattery in the Kyiv region of Ukraine. We specialize in Oriental Shorthair and Siamese cats — elegant, intelligent, and deeply affectionate companions.
home.familySubtitle: Our kittens in their new homes

about.storyText: Floriente Cattery was born from a deep love for Oriental and Siamese cats. Our founder Elvira has dedicated years to understanding these extraordinary breeds — their elegance, intelligence, and remarkable bond with humans.
about.storyText2: We are a small, home-based cattery where every cat is a family member. Our kittens grow up surrounded by love, daily interaction, and the comfort of a real home.
about.philosophyHealthDesc: Every breeding cat is tested for genetic diseases. We share all test results openly — because transparency builds trust.
about.philosophyHomeDesc: Our cats live among us. Kittens are socialized from birth with people, sounds, and everyday life.
about.philosophyQualityDesc: We have only a few litters per year. Each kitten receives individual attention and care.
about.philosophySupportDesc: We stay connected with every family. Our support doesn't end when the kitten leaves — it's just the beginning.
about.homeSubtitle: Our cats share our home and our life
about.healthText: We believe that responsible breeding starts with health. All our breeding cats undergo comprehensive genetic testing to ensure healthy kittens.
about.healthTests: Our cats are tested for PRA, PK Deficiency, and other breed-specific conditions. Test results are available upon request.

blog.heroText: Stories, tips, and insights about Oriental and Siamese cats from our cattery.
blog.emptyText: We're preparing our first articles. Check back soon for stories about breed care, health, and life at Floriente.

contact.heroText: We'd love to hear from you. Whether you're interested in a kitten, have questions about the breed, or just want to say hello — reach out through any channel that suits you.
contact.whatsappDesc: Our primary channel. Write anytime — we usually reply within a few hours.
contact.emailDesc: For formal inquiries, contracts, or documents.
contact.instagramDesc: Follow our daily life, new litters, and behind-the-scenes moments.
contact.tiktokDesc: Follow us for daily moments with our cats and kittens.
contact.instagramDmDesc: Send us a direct message on Instagram for a quick chat.
contact.locationNote: Kitten delivery available across Europe. Exact location shared after reservation.
contact.hoursText: We typically respond within 2–4 hours during daytime (EET/EEST). Evenings and weekends may take a bit longer.

howToBuy.heroTitle: Your Journey to a Floriente Kitten
howToBuy.heroText: We believe finding the right kitten should be personal, transparent, and joyful. Here's how it works — from the first message to a lifetime of friendship.
howToBuy.processSubtitle: From first contact to lifelong friendship — seven simple steps
howToBuy.step1Desc: Write to us on WhatsApp or Instagram. Tell us about yourself, your family, and what you're looking for in a companion.
howToBuy.step2Desc: We'll arrange a short video call so we can meet each other, answer your questions, and show you our home and cats.
howToBuy.step3Desc: Once we have a litter available, we'll help you find the kitten whose personality and temperament are the best fit for your family.
howToBuy.step4Desc: Secure your kitten with a 50% deposit and a signed contract. From this moment, your kitten is reserved for you.
howToBuy.step5Desc: Receive regular photos and videos as your kitten grows. You'll see their first steps, first games, and developing personality.
howToBuy.step6Desc: At 3+ months your kitten is fully vaccinated, microchipped, and ready to come home. We arrange personal delivery across Europe.
howToBuy.step7Desc: Our relationship doesn't end at handover. We stay in touch for advice on adaptation, nutrition, behaviour — anytime you need us.
howToBuy.pricingSubtitle: Transparent pricing with no hidden costs
howToBuy.petDesc: For loving families. Includes spay/neuter contract.
howToBuy.breedShowDesc: For approved breeding programmes or show careers. Pricing discussed individually based on the kitten.
howToBuy.depositNote: Non-refundable if the buyer cancels. Fully refundable if we are unable to provide the kitten.
howToBuy.tcoSubtitle: A responsible breeder saves you thousands in the long run
howToBuy.includedSubtitle: Every kitten leaves with everything they need to start their new life
howToBuy.responsibilitiesSubtitle: We trust our families — and ask for a few promises in return
howToBuy.resp2: Follow the breeder's care and nutrition guidelines
howToBuy.resp3: Do not rehome without the breeder's consent
howToBuy.resp4: Share updates — we love seeing our kittens thrive
howToBuy.supportText: Elvira stays in contact with every family. Whether you need advice on adaptation, nutrition, or behaviour, we're always here. Many of our families stay in touch for years, sharing photos and milestones.
howToBuy.supportQuote: We raise not just beautiful cats — we develop character, connection, and a future lifelong love.
howToBuy.ctaText: The first step is always a conversation. Write to us and we'll be happy to tell you about our upcoming litters.
